name: Vanessa Belmonte Alt Scenario
description:
Hello! This is an alt scenario for my existing Vanessa Belmonte bot that more closely follows the plot of the original image the character came from (which you can see above).

Sorry this description is more sparse than my usual bots. This used to be a bot poll too but I cleared it all out. Hence all the numbers in the reviews.

🎨: Art by Skecchiart
